review_log.reviewer_role: Senior Product Manager / VP of Product

findings.description: Initial PRD had only 46 requirements — insufficient for enterprise scope

fixes.fix_description: Expanded from 46 to 103 Requirement IDs across 10 categories. Added performance, DR, maintenance, funnels, data licensing, AI try-on, jewellery features, branding, multi-city, ShipRocket, kill switch, and unique differentiators. MVP scope tier defined.

agent_0_verification.notes: 103 requirements across 10 categories. VP-level review conducted and approved.
